Author: elchupi
Name: AnimSwapper
Punchline: Race/job animation swaps + Glamourer territory automation
Description:
Swap walk/run animations between races. Swap weapon hold, movement, and auto-attack animations between jobs. Auto-apply Glamourer designs by territory.

Requires Penumbra (for animation swaps) and Glamourer (for glamour automation).
Changelog: Fix idle pose passthrough from Penumbra. Race swap targets now resolve through Penumbra so user mods chain correctly on redraw.
